params_frozen.design_provenance: Direct response to v10 drawdown-control overlay FAIL (paradigm failure #11) and the cross-period diagnostic STABLE verdict (αt range 1.52, all sub-periods ≥+1.65) confirming v9D's +2.29 alpha-t is regime-uniform across the burnt 2024-04-30→2026-04-30 holdout. Burnt-holdout multiplicity is exhausted on this signal: 9 evaluations on the same window cannot break free of program-Bonferroni n=24. The only path to deploy-grade evidence is prospective replication on data accruing post-2026-04-30. This pre-reg locks v9D's specification AS-IS (no parameter retuning) and commits to weekly forward-walk paper-trading for ≥52 weeks before any capital deploy.
params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: Perplexity (sonar-reasoning-pro 2026-05-04, two rounds) ranked H+ paper-trade as #1 of 8 candidate paths because it is the ONLY path that bypasses the burnt-holdout multiplicity penalty and tests forward predictability rather than diagnosing the burnt finding. All other paths (B/C/D/E retrospective on burnt window, F international universe, G pre-2018 retrospective) either incur new Bonferroni cells without escaping multiplicity or face data-access constraints. Zen earlier flagged that any 'honest +2.29' might be selection effect from 4 prior tests — mitigation is freezing v9D as-spec'd (NOT averaging across v7-v9D) and letting prospective track record speak. The v9D L/S diagnostic was already FAIL'd (αt=−0.92), so no L/S construction path. The +2.29 finding survived 5-phase multi-phase audit with mean+2.29 (range [+1.86,+2.92]) — v10 confirmed base-replication via gate G4. Cross-period diagnostic 2026-05-04 confirmed STABLE verdict (αt range 1.52 across 4 calendar sub-periods, min +1.65 well above CONCENTRATED floor 0.5). Prior on regime-stability is HIGH; prior on +2.29 surviving forward replication is moderate-to-high.

base_scorer.specification: Per-asof OLS residual of −ivp30 against (reversal_1m, momentum_6m, rv_30d) cross-sectionally; long top-decile equal-weighted by residual
base_scorer.modification_during_h_plus: PROHIBITED — any drift in scorer spec invalidates the prospective test

params_frozen.data_provider: iVolatility $399 retail tier (probe v5 99.5% T1) — same as v7/v8/v9D/v10
params_frozen.data_endpoint_primary: /equities/stock-market-data (smd) — daily SMD pull for current PIT universe

operational.data_refresh_cron: Sunday 17:00 local — pulls last 7d SMD for current PIT universe via launchd
operational.scoring_cron: Monday 06:00 local — computes residual, picks top decile, appends ledger entry, updates state.yaml

periods.rationale: First trading day of fresh data after burnt holdout 2024-04-30 → 2026-04-30. Weekly stride means 26 obs ≈ 6mo, 52 obs ≈ 12mo.

success_criteria.primary_metric: Carhart-4F alpha t-stat (HAC=5) on weekly portfolio returns (long-only top decile) vs MDY benchmark, computed cumulatively from 2026-05-04 onwards

bonferroni_accounting.rationale: Fresh post-burnt-holdout window means this is a NEW signal class with intra-class n=1 (this is the first prospective replication). Unadjusted single-test threshold |t|≥1.96 applies. Does NOT increment the program-level alpha-class counter because (a) prospective replication on fresh data is methodologically distinct from retrospective hypothesis testing, (b) even if it were counted, it's the first test in a NEW class so program n=25 → threshold ~3.10 — but unadjusted is the right test here per pre-reg discipline and standard prospective replication practice.

checkpoint_gates.rule: Cumulative Carhart-4F αt ≥ 1.96 AND Sharpe net ≥ 0.30
checkpoint_gates.fail_action: archive class as 'prospective_replication_failed_26w_2026_11_04', write postmortem, do NOT auto-pivot to refined design within the same session (anti-HARKing per feedback memo)
checkpoint_gates.power_estimate: If true αt=+2.29, expected SE on 26 weekly obs ≈ 0.96, expected observed t ≈ 2.39 → ~70% power at α=0.05. Marginal — passing 26w gate is informative but not definitive.

checkpoint_gates.rule: Cumulative Carhart-4F αt ≥ 1.96 AND Sharpe net ≥ 0.30 AND no single sub-period αt < +0.5
checkpoint_gates.pass_action: ELIGIBLE for capital-deploy review (subject to user approval; deploy NOT automatic; further pre-reg required for sizing/risk-management)
checkpoint_gates.fail_action: archive class, write postmortem, options-implied class fully closed
checkpoint_gates.power_estimate: If true αt=+2.29, expected SE on 52 weekly obs ≈ 0.68, expected observed t ≈ 3.37 → ~95% power at α=0.05. Well-powered; strong evidence either direction.

kill_pre_full_run: Data refresh skip rate >5% in any week (data quality issue, e.g. iVolatility API outage)
Ledger drift detected: |observed weekly return - reconstructed weekly return| > 1bp on any week (calculation bug)
PIT universe size <500 tickers in any week (universe collapse — would invalidate decile estimation)
Realized cost drag >40bps RT in any week (cost model breakdown — pre-reg cost is 30bps)
success_criteria.abandonment_rule: If at any time before the 26w checkpoint a kill condition fires for >2 consecutive weeks, abandon the class and write postmortem. Pre-reg kill conditions are operational integrity gates, NOT performance gates — performance verdict only at checkpoints.
success_criteria.no_stretch_tier: Single 26w + 52w gate sequence. No exploratory tier; no early stopping for performance reasons.
success_criteria.regime_stratification_postdoc: DESCRIPTIVE only: at 52w checkpoint, report cumulative αt split by VIX>20 vs VIX<20 sub-periods. Not a gate; informational only.
success_criteria.capital_deploy_clause: Capital deploy OFF-TABLE until 52w gate PASS. PASS at 52w triggers a separate pre-reg cycle for sizing/risk-management before any real money. Earliest possible capital deploy: 2027-Q3 (with pre-reg, sizing approval, infrastructure setup).
